http_idle_timeout_secs.description: Idle timeout for HTTP keep-alive connections in seconds

handler_stale_timeout_secs.description: Seconds after a handler disconnect before it is reaped from the routing table

id.description: Daemon-local bot identifier. Must be a slug: lowercase letters, digits, hyphens, and underscores only. Maximum 64 characters.

display_name.description: Human-readable display name for the bot profile; used as the @mention alias in squad channels. Must be unique among bots.

about.description: Description text published in the bot's kind:0 profile

picture.description: URL to the bot's profile picture (http:// or https://)

mls_db_path.description: Path to the per-bot MLS SQLite database

mls_key_package_freshness_secs.description: Freshness window in seconds for MLS KeyPackage events

mls_dedup_window_secs.description: Time window in seconds for MLS group-message deduplication
